issues.note: All 2404 sitemap URLs share lastmod 2026-07-07 (flat). Left open by design: it is a manually-pinned constant (scripts/generateSitemap.mjs LASTMOD), explicitly not new Date(), bumped only when content actually changes, so it never stamps today on unchanged URLs across redeploys. Introducing per-page dates without real per-entity change tracking would be less honest. Revisit when per-entity modification timestamps exist.
